data.title: COPT Defense Provides Conference Call Details to Discuss Q1 2026 Results
data.description: A company known as COPT Defense Properties (NYSE: CDP) has shared information regarding the discussion of their first quarter 2026 results. The release date for the results is set for Monday, April 27, 2026, after the market closes. A conference call is scheduled for the following day, Tuesday, April 28, 2026, at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time. Those interested in participating in the conference call must register using a provided link to obtain the dial-in number and personal pin.

data.title: SUNSTONE HOTEL INVESTORS SCHEDULES FIRST QUARTER 2026 EARNINGS RELEASE AND CONFERENCE CALL
data.description: Sunstone Hotel Investors, Inc., a company listed on NYSE under the symbol SHO, based in Aliso Viejo, California, will be releasing its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, prior to the opening of the market. The management team will conduct its quarterly briefing on that day.

data.title: Edesa Biotech Invited for Oral Showcase at Respiratory Innovation Summit
data.description: After positive results in Phase 3 trials, Paridiprubart has been chosen due to demonstrating statistically significant reductions in mortality rates for patients with Acute Respiratory Distress Syndrome (ARDS). The study showed a substantial decrease in mortality by X% compared to the control group. This selection comes as a promising development in the treatment of ARDS, impacting a significant number of patients globally. It marks a notable advancement in medical research and has the potential to enhance outcomes for individuals suffering from this condition.

data.title: GoHealth Prioritizes Consumer Fit, Renewal Economics and Cash Discipline While Continuing Leadership in Special Needs Plans; Reports Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: A strategic stance has been taken by the company, showcasing prioritization of consumer needs in the enrollment process. This shift includes a deliberate decision to scale back on Medicare Advantage plans due to market conditions. The company remains a frontrunner in specialized special needs plans (SNP) and is directing investments towards artificial intelligence technologies. Emphasis is being placed on maintaining cash reserves, long-term sustainability of existing portfolios, and preparedness for potential mergers and acquisitions.

data.title: Seven Hills Realty Trust First Quarter 2026 Conference Call Scheduled for Wednesday, April 29th
data.description: In Newton, Massachusetts, Seven Hills Realty Trust (Nasdaq: SEVN) revealed plans to release its first quarter 2026 financial results following Nasdaq's closure on Tuesday, April 28, 2026. President Tom Lorenzini, CFO Matthew Brown, and VP Jared Lewis will conduct a conference call at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, to review these results.

data.title: Other World Computing (OWC) to Showcase Storage and Connectivity Solutions for Photographers, Enthusiasts, and Business Management at ShutterFest
data.description: OWC, a leading provider of storage, memory, connectivity, software, and accessories for professionals to enhance performance, reliability, and workflow efficiency, revealed plans to exhibit its range of high-performance memory cards and readers, fast and reliable storage, and connectivity solutions. The company will highlight products aimed at boosting, safeguarding, and simplifying photography processes.

data.title: Valmont Industries, Inc. Announces Timing of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: In Omaha, Nebraska, Valmont® Industries, Inc. (NYSE: VMI) is set to announce its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on Tuesday, April 21, 2026, before the market opens. Valmont is recognized globally for providing essential products and solutions for infrastructure and enhancing agricultural productivity. Avner M. Applbaum, the President and CEO, along with Thomas Liguori, the EVP and CFO, will conduct a webcast and conference following the earnings release. This quarterly update will be crucial for investors and analysts tracking the company's performance.

data.title: Newmont Announces First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call
data.description: Newmont Corporation, listed under the tickers NEM on NYSE, ASX, and PNGX, is set to unveil its first quarter 2026 financial results on Thursday, April 23, 2026, after the closing of North American markets. Following this release, a conference call discussing the outcomes is scheduled for 5:30 p.m. Eastern Daylight Time on the same day, with an equivalent timing of 7:30 a.m. Australian Eastern Standard Time on Friday, April 24, 2026. Those interested can access a replay of the webcast through the company's website, with the event named "Newmont’s First Quarter 2026 Result."

data.title: American Tower Plans First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: American Tower Corporation (NYSE: AMT) has unveiled that its Q1 2026 results will be announced through news services at 7:00 a.m. ET on Tuesday, April 28, 2026. A conference call is then scheduled at 8:30 a.m. ET the same day to delve into these results. For those interested in participating via dial-in, there is a pre-registration link available. The earnings call is a significant event for investors and stakeholders to gain insights into the company's performance.

data.title: Amrize Appoints Baris Oran as Chief Financial Officer
data.description: In a recent announcement, Amrize (AMRZ) has named Baris Oran as the new Chief Financial Officer and a member of the Executive Committee, starting from April 1. Oran takes over from Ian Johnston, who will resign from the position but continue to assist as a senior advisor for a seamless transition. Oran's previous role was as CFO at GXO Logistics post its separation from XPO. During his tenure, he established a robust finance team to bolster the company's operations.

data.title: Excelerate Energy Names New FSRU Excelerate Acadia at HD Hyundai Heavy Industries
data.description: Excelerate Energy, Inc. (NYSE: EE) unveiled its latest floating storage and regasification unit, Excelerate Acadia, at a naming ceremony held at the Hyundai Heavy Industries shipyard in Ulsan, South Korea. This marks the first Excelerate FSRU constructed by HD Hyundai Heavy Industries, emphasizing Excelerate Energy's ongoing collaboration with top shipbuilders worldwide. The event, attended by company executives and stakeholders, signifies a milestone in the company's expansion efforts.

data.title: UiPath to Showcase Latest Agentic Business Orchestration Capabilities and Product Strategy in Upcoming Webinar
data.description: UiPath, Inc. (NYSE: PATH) revealed its plan to conduct a live webinar on April 6, 2026, from 11:30 am to 12:30 pm ET. The event will showcase the company's latest agentic business orchestration capabilities, product strategy, and real-world customer outcomes. Featuring Daniel Dines, the Founder and CEO, and Raghu Malpani, the webinar will delve into UiPath's product strategy, customer impact, and a fireside chat.
